intake.event_framing: Assess 30-day escalation risk after a Gulf shipping strike and retaliatory warnings.
intake.current_development: Iran-backed attacks on Gulf shipping are followed by US retaliatory threats and regional force movement.
known_constraints: Energy market disruption would hurt both sides
Regional allies are pressing for restraint
known_unknowns: Whether proxy militias will act independently

summary: Neither side wants immediate total war

documents.us-iran-warning.md: The United States warns Iran that any further attacks on Gulf shipping will trigger retaliation while allies push restraint.
documents.iran-mobilization.md: Iran signals mobilization and missile readiness near the Gulf as regional diplomats attempt backchannel talks.

intake.event_framing: Assess crisis dynamics after a Japanese naval transit through the Taiwan Strait triggers a Chinese military response.
intake.current_development: A Japanese naval transit through the Taiwan Strait triggers Chinese intercept threats and emergency diplomacy.
known_constraints: Commercial shipping lanes must stay open
US alliance commitments are under scrutiny

summary: Both parties want to avoid a shooting war

documents.japan-transit.md: Japan defends the Taiwan Strait transit as lawful while China threatens an intercept and raises naval readiness.
documents.china-backchannel.md: Chinese and Japanese officials keep emergency backchannel talks open to avoid a wider clash in the strait.

intake.event_framing: Assess 21-day escalation risk after a Second Thomas Shoal water-cannon clash sharpens domestic resolve and alliance signaling.
intake.current_development: A Chinese coast guard water-cannon incident near Second Thomas Shoal triggers Philippine public resolve messaging, alliance coordination around a US security guarantee, and a reopened backchannel with Beijing after an intercept threat.
known_constraints: Both sides want to avoid a direct naval firefight
US security commitments are being publicly tested
known_unknowns: Whether another resupply mission will force a direct intercept

summary: Philippine leadership faces domestic audience pressure to show resolve while preserving alliance backing and backchannel diplomacy

documents.shoal-water-cannon.md: Philippine officials issue an official statement after the Second Thomas Shoal water-cannon clash warning that public resolve, domestic political pressure, and alliance coordination under the US security guarantee will shape the next resupply mission.
documents.beijing-hotline.md: Chinese and Philippine officials keep a backchannel hotline active after the shoal clash as regional diplomats push negotiation to avoid another coast guard intercept threat and preserve diplomatic signaling.
